name: Berentzen-Gruppe Aktiengesellschaft
summary: Berentzen-Gruppe Aktiengesellschaft produces and sells spirits and non-alcoholic beverages for the food retail and hospitality sectors in Germany, rest of Europe, and internationally. It operates through Spirits, Non-alcoholic Beverages, and Fresh Juice Systems segments. The company provides non-alcoholic beverages, including mineral water, soft drinks, energy drinks, wellness drinks, iced tea, lemonades, and sports drinks; spirits; and fruit presses and juicers, and bottling systems, as well as untreated after-harvest oranges. It markets, distributes, and sells its products under the Berentzen, Pushkin, Tres Pa√É¬≠ses, Strothmann, Hansen Rum, Kr√É¬§uterbraut, Vivaris, Bommerlunder, Doornkaat, frutas naturales, Strothmann, Emsland Quelle, M√É¬§rkisch Kristall, Mio Mio, Sinalco, Citrocasa, and other brand names. The company also provides branded dealer and private-label spirits. The company was founded in 1758 and is headquartered in Hasel√É¬ºnne, Germany.
